description:
Goal: move interpreter, JIT, and AOT onto the settled Compiler2 backend handoff without rediscovering semantics. Signal: backend consumers take Compiler2-owned closed artifacts and never call back into semantic closure, type inference, old planner reachability, or old codegen fact derivation to fill missing data.

Grounding from the current code:
- Compiler2 now closes the artifact ladder as MaterializedProgram(root) -> AbiReadyProgram(root) -> EmissionReadyProgram(root).
- The old interpreter still consumes Module + ModulePlan and re-runs plan_module_with_role / resolve_module_types work.
- The old native path still consumes Module + ModulePlan, then rebuilds PlannedProgram and AbiFacts through prepare_preplanned_native / materialize_program / AbiFacts::derive before JIT/AOT codegen.
- EmissionReadyProgram carries settled call edges, return ABI, param/value reprs, callable entries, extern marshal classes, effects, and stable emission inventory, but it is not the old Module + PlannedProgram + AbiFacts shape.

Strategy: do not synthesize old semantic or planner artifacts on the side. Instead, add the minimal Compiler2-native backend lowering and move consumers over in dependency order: lower settled Compiler2 artifacts to backend IR once, switch the interpreter, switch the shared native pipeline, then switch outer entry points and delete compiler2-side fallback.

Design constraints:
- No shims, bridges, or adapter-side planner rediscovery.
- Old ir_lower / ir_codegen code may be referenced for durable invariants or reusable mechanics, but Compiler2 remains by-function and artifact-driven.
- Unsupported or missing closed facts are fatal; telemetry stays raw.

Checks:
- Backend paths fail if they ask semantic/type/callee/reachability questions after the artifact boundary.
- Quicksort, Enum.reduce, and variadic extern fixtures preserve callable-entry, return-ABI, marshal, and effect contracts through the backend handoff.
- Compiler2-specific backend paths do not call prepare_preplanned_native, materialize_program, AbiFacts::derive, plan_module_with_role, or resolve_module_types to fill missing facts.
title: Compiler2 backends: consume EmissionReadyProgram mechanically
